item.title: Thump back. Stand up for others. ESPECIALLY as white men.
item.description: Keith Self (left, schmuck) intentionally misgenders representative Sarah McBride (far right). McBride responds by referring to Self as madame chair, misgendering him in turn. Bill Keating (right) interrupts to demand decorum, respect, and courtesy from chairperson Self. Self repeats referring to representative McBride as "mister." Keith then adjourns the meeting in cowardice of being asked for common courtesy. Two social items of note on display here. McBride immediately bites back with proportional and oppositional response, attacking Keith's gender via titles as he had attacked her. Anti fragility is an act of bouncing back in the same direction and force as a force acted upon us. The other is representative Keating using his seat of status, and his voice as a white man (white, straight, Christian men hold more social status than any composite of marginalized demographics) to demand decency of Keith. Keith, confronted with someone standing up to bullying, runs away. Sometimes, those with demographics of higher power status feel unempowered to intervene on the behalf of others. It's not our business, not our culture, we aren't that gender. We can be emboldened to yank others up the ladders with us, and to kick these glass jaws down to the basement. White men have 90% of the money, votes, power. We need their solidarity to change the house of cards that has been built.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: No Kings.
item.description: Hundreds of American generals from all around the world are summoned at the Marine Corps University in Virginia. The exact reason for this is yet unknown. They may be expected to pledge unconditional allegiance to Trump, the retired senior high ranking US military officer Ben Hodges has already compared the Virginia gathering on social media to the infamous 1935 Berlin rally, where German generals were forced to pledge allegiance to Hitler.
item.dc:creator: 19marcurious57

item.title: Absurdly under-qualified politician promises to bring back bullying and hazing
item.description: Pete Hegseth, who would be the laughing stock of the planet if he wasn’t constantly being upstaged by the president, flew in generals from all over he world at phenomenal expense to tell them policies against “toxic leadership” aren’t just being ended, they’re being “reversed.” https://www.ctvnews.ca/world/article/hegseth-declares-an-end-to-politically-correct-leadership-in-the-us-military/

item.title: Hexia's resting disappointed face
item.description: Or a RBF if you're fancy. Guys...IMGUR is inaccessible from the UK. I felt so shocked when I couldn't get on!!! So I bought a VPN and am VPNing to deliver you this art today. I've never felt the need or want for a VPN before, but this community means too much to me personally, to cease ever posting again. my links https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella

item.title: Imgur goes dark for the UK
item.description: Imgur is now inaccessible from the UK. It looks like Imgur has geofenced off the UK in order to avoid any hassle of dealing with the UK legislation brought in by the internet safety act. I can't say I can blame imgur for doing this, it's an easy quick fix, and long term comes down to a cost vs benefit issue of engineering your site to conform to foreign legislation. So far the internet safety act seems to be a complete disaster of a policy, with such stupidity as being locked out from changing your drivers on a graphics card, to political messages on twitter being hidden behind a poorly thought out identification wall.
item.dc:creator: TheNihilistsParadoxicalWashingMachine

item.title: GovBrief Today #242
item.description: They fired the whistleblowers who exposed fair housing violations, shot pepper rounds at a journalist documenting ICE operations, and charged activists for posting an agent's address online. On the same day, Trump collected $24.5 million from YouTube, slashed coal royalties while tripling public land access, and his former campaign manager registered as Israel's foreign agent to influence young Americans and AI models like ChatGPT. The grift happens in daylight because they've made documenting it the crime. Screenshot. Archive. Share. When they attack the people who expose corruption harder than they punish the corruption itself, your documentation becomes resistance. Don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #govbrieftoday #resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/cbs-reporter-pepper-spray [2] https://go.govbrief.today/pritzker-troops-ice-chicago [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-agent-doxing-charges [4] https://go.govbrief.today/parscale-foreign-agent-israel [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-netanyahu-gaza-plan [6] https://go.govbrief.today/hud-whistleblower-lawyers-fired [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-housing-aid-cuts [8] https://go.govbrief.today/coal-mining-federal-lands [9] https://go.govbrief.today/govt-shutdown-looms-24hours [10] https://go.govbrief.today/shuttle-discovery-move-blocked [11] https://go.govbrief.today/iowa-revokes-roberts-license [12] https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-hhs-grants-endangered [13] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-trump-lake [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-doj-supersedes-mpsb [15] https://go.govbrief.today/fema-cbp-data-breach [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ai-deepfake-vulgar [17] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-foreign-film-threat [18] https://go.govbrief.today/youtube-settles-trump-lawsuit [19] https://go.govbrief.today/find-local-healthcare-cuts Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: eBay surprise!
item.description: This is news to me - apparently I can post videos longer than a minute here now??? Woohoo! I used to break them up into minute-long chunks, and was a bit worried this video wouldn't really work by breaking it into 2 parts. Anyways, I hope you enjoyed this little story about a fun and surprising package I received from eBay :)

item.title: He needs to be impeached. Immediately.
item.description:
https://www.npr.org/2025/09/30/nx-s1-5557232/hegseth-generals-trump
There is no other way to put this. Trump wants to start a civil war, turning active duty military against American citizens on American soil. He needs to be impeached. Today. It doesn't matter if there is no follow through, or the courts stop him. This is he wants to do. Nothing else matters. Fuck the shut down. Fuck everything else. Impeach him. Right now.
item.dc:creator: Illinifan88

item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: Return of the meme: 1480 (whatever)
item.description:
Let's... I guess get this bread, whatever, I don't care.
Dont even know why I bother staying alive anymore, it ain't gonna get better, even if it finally happens.
I only have two months left of savings before I'll be on the street, I can't get the appointment I need, I can't find a job that pays, and I'm a useless sack of autism.
Whatever. Anyway. Have some memes. There's no point in me bitching, it ain't gonna fix shit.
I'm so done surviving. But I don't know what else to do at this point. Would this be the middle ages, or some fae court, where someone could keep me as some sort of trick person who can identify the bird you point at or some shit.
Accurate, brain. Very accurate.
My head hurts, and my anxiety is so great that I feel constantly at the edge of vomiting. Being an enemy of the state doesn't feel cool at all.
Maybe someone from ICE can just break my door down and my head open and I can get it over with that way.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "me too. What doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
